calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To (1) Confirm Consolidation Of Trusts; And (2) Terminate Trust
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-23-306359 The Helen M. Harris Family Trust and
PTR-23-306361 The Robert D. Harris Family Trust.

Appearances: Scott Fraser appeared by zoom for James Harris (trustee).

The court noted that it has not heard anything from the guardian ad litem. Mr. Fraser stated that the guardian ad litem could not be present, and that if the court grants a short continuance, he can submit signed consents by the guardian ad litem and that he can submit the consents this week. The Petition for Order to Confirm Consolidation of Trusts, etc. (2) are under submission pending receipt of the consents from the guardian ad litem.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.

Petition For Order To (1) Confirm Consolidation Of Trusts; And (2) Terminate Trust
